items.headline: Albemarle: A Different Storage Boom
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation is regaining momentum as lithium prices rebound, driven by surging energy storage systems (ESS). ALB Q1'26 EPS $2.95, EBITDA $664M. ESS demand growing at 117% YTD pace, offsetting sluggish EV growth.

items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Wins Analyst Upgrades As Lithium Expansion Story Gains Support
items.snippet: Albemarle received analyst upgrades. Citi and RBC citing expansion and productivity improvements. Stock at $133.7 after pullback of 16.6% over past week and 24.7% over past month, still up 108.6% over past year.

items.headline: Energy storage demand grows 40% annually
items.snippet: ESS demand becoming more balanced distribution with EV. Rio Tinto planning to increase lithium production by 2028. Albemarle noting steady ESS demand growth.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: RBC expects lithium supply to remain tight through 2027. Raised 2026/2027 EBITDA estimates to $2.8B/$2.9B. Outperform, PT $257.
